title: In Cuba, an unprecedented health crisis is deepening under US oil blockade
subhead: Epidemics have spread across the Caribbean island as fuel shortages disrupt hospital operations and hinder garbage collection. Those living with chronic illnesses have found it increasingly difficult to access treatment.

title: Pope Leo XIV calls for 'disarming AI'
France's film funding agency targeted by the far right
US says Iran deal still possible, as Trump tempers expectations
subhead: Even though both Tehran and Washington have signaled progress toward reaching an agreement to end the war, US President Donald Trump told his negotiators on Sunday 'not to rush into a deal,' insisting that 'time is on our side.'

title: A €100,000 contract and possible mistaken identity: New clues emerge in murder of anti-drug activist's brother
subhead: The case file shows that the Marseille murder stemmed from major organized crime, involving several competing teams of hitmen. According to some suspects' statements, it was Amine Kessaci and not his brother Mehdi who was targeted, due to his commitment to fighting drug trafficking.

title: Kyiv attacks: The complex logistics network behind Russia's war machine
subhead: The Ukrainian capital endured a barrage of strikes over the weekend, including ballistic missiles, cruise missiles and long-range drones. These increasingly frequent hybrid operations reveal the intensification of Russian drone and missile production.

title: France and Mali's pro-independence rebels: A history shaped by alliances and mutual interests
subhead: Bamako's military junta has accused Paris of supporting the Azawad Liberation Front (ALF), which launched an offensive in northern Mali at the end of April. These claims are based on the French authorities' historical ties with the pro-independence rebel groups, though those connections have since weakened.

Why dropping the worst-case climate scenario does not undermine the reality of global warming
subhead: A new generation of climate scenarios has set aside RCP8.5, which projected a nearly 5°C rise in global temperatures by 2100. Donald Trump presents this as proof of 'alarmism' among climate scientists, but the new projections remain highly concerning.

title: Patrick Bruel and a textbook case of debates around sexual violence
subhead: Around 30 women have accused the French singer of sexual violence. Eight complaints have been filed and five investigations are open, in a case that has reignited questions about respect for the presumption of innocence and the statute of limitations.

title: Five arrested over smuggling of Californian cannabis to France
subhead: A former influencer known as 'PA7' and a counterfeiter known as 'the Prince of Fake Luxury Watches' are suspected of having illegally imported hundreds of kilograms of 'Cali' marijuana.
